titleStmt.title: SII 9.120: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 120. (A.R. No. 121 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE NARASIMHASVAMIN TEMPLE AT RANGAPURAM, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 979, Hēmaḷambi, Chaitra, śu. 8, Bṛihaspativāra corresponding probably to A.D. 1058 March 5, Thursday. The Śaka year was, however, 980 expired and the cyclic year Viḷamba. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Trailōkyamalladēva and records that 23 mattars of land were granted by the Mahājanas of Māgoḷa for the service of the god Narasiṁhadēva and some land for the service of the god Gaṇapatidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sakavarṣa 979 neya hēmaḷaṁbasaṁvatsarada caitra suddha 8
brihaspativāradaṁdu śrīnarasiṅghadēvarige biṭṭa keyi yippattāmūṟu maṁgaḷa .
svasti śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakan satyāśrayakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladē
vara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha
mānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa
maunānuṣṭhānajapaśīlasaṁpannarappa śrīmat mā
gōḷadūroḍeyapramukhamahājanavinnūrbaruṁ
śrīnarasiṅghadēvargge bidirppaḷḷiyūroḍeyara mānya
dereya keyya mūḍaṇa patugeyalippatu ma
tadereya keyya teṟayaṁ tettumikkudu dēvara
dharmmabrayadarttha © dēvara mūḍaṇa deseyal
paḷakeyi mattaru 4 tuḍukevaṭṭinalli Aṟuva
ṇadē tuṇbadu maṇalakeyi matta 6 Intī dharmmama
Innūrbbaru pratipāḷisuvar I dharmmavanaḷidaṁge
bāṇarāsiyal brāhmaṇaruma kavileyu
manaḷida dōṣamakku Idaṁ rakṣisidavargge kurukṣē
tradal sāyira kavileya brahmaṇargge dānaṁgeyi
da puṇyamakku © svadataṁ paradataṁ vā yō
harēti vasundharāṁ śaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . śrīgaṇapattidēvarige dēmaṇa
na ghaṭṭadi(m)ndaṁ baḍagaldesayoḷu patti nelasaṇa maṁggaḷa
mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
